productDisplayName: Wild stone Men Ultra Sensual Deo
description: Straight from the wild stone collection of deodorants comes this fabulous Ultra Sensual body spray. It's the ultimate range of irresistible masculine fragrances. The deodorant comes in a cylindrical bottle. Quantity: 150 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
